1.name: green
1.text: Hey there! I'm a bot

1.name: teal
1.text: And I'm another bot!

1.name: purple
1.text: Try moving us around!

1.name: nextStep
1.text: Click me when you're ready to move on

1.name: nextStep
1.text: Click on the speech bubbles before moving on!

2.name: purple
2.text: Notice how we can be different colors?

2.name: purple
2.text: We store our colors in "Tags"

2.name: changer
2.text: Yeah! Click on me to change my #color

3.name: yellow
3.text: We also come in different sizes!

3.name: orange
3.text: Our sizes are stored in our "scale" tags

3.name: teal
3.text: Click on me to change my #scale!

4.name: blue
4.text: You can also use scale to stretch and squish us

4.name: red
4.text: Notice how we are all stretched in different directions?

4.name: green
4.text: Each direction has a name: X, Y, and Z

4.name: green
4.text: Click on me to change my #scaleY

4.name: blue
4.text: Or me to change my #scaleZ

4.name: red
4.text: Or me for #scaleX!

5.name: yellow
5.text: We can also be different shapes

5.name: teal
5.text: Click on me to see the options for my #form tag!

5.name: formTagBot
5.text: Click me and try typing one of those shapes in my #form tag!

6.name: greenProxy
6.text: One last thing! We can rotate

6.name: blue
6.text: Yeah! Click on me to change my #homeRotationZ

1.name: pizza
1.text: Check it out! We can be any shape

1.name: sushi
1.text: You just need a model to upload

1.name: frame
1.text: Or a picture!

1.name: nextProxy
1.text: You can add your own picture on the next step

2.name: teal
2.text: Try dragging a picture from your computer here

2.name: teal
2.text: It will automatically make a bot with its #form tag set to "sprite"

2.name: teal
2.text: (That's what we call pictures)

2.name: teal
2.text: You can also use pictures from the internet

2.name: teal
2.text: Click on the bot you just made to change its #formAddress tag

2.name: help
2.text: Don't worry, I'll add a picture for you!

3.name: soda
3.text: Let's try adding a model

3.name: soda
3.text: You'll need to upload a .GLTF or .GLB file

3.name: soda
3.text: Just drag the file here from your computer

3.name: helpProxy
3.text: Need a model? Click on me for help!

4.name: foxProxy
4.text: We can also be animated!

4.name: foxProxy
4.text: Click on me to change my #formAnimation tag

1.name: green
1.text: We can do things when you click on us!

1.name: pink
1.text: Yeah! Click on each of us to see what happens!

2.name: teal
2.text: We all have different ways of saying "hi"

2.name: red
2.text: Click on us to see!

2.name: purple
2.text: Then, try making us say something else

3.name: colorChanger
3.text: I'm listening for more than just clicks!

3.name: colorChanger
3.text: Click on any of the tags on my right to change what they do

3.name: mover
3.text: And you can control me with your keyboard!

3.name: mover
3.text: Push your arrow keys to see

4.name: pink
4.text: Now you should try programming!

4.name: pink
4.text: We'll start really simple

4.name: pink
4.text: Try the challenge on the right

4.name: helpProxy
4.text: If you ever get stuck, click on me!

5.name: changer
5.text: Now, try making me change color!

5.name: changer
5.text: If you want a bonus challenge... Make me change between two colors

6.name: labelBot
6.text: Try changing my label when you click on me

6.name: labelBot
6.text: I have some code to get you started

6.name: labelBot
6.text: I left //comments to explain what it does

7.name: mover
7.text: Can you make me move each time you click on me?

8.name: purple
8.text: See if you can make me come back down after I go up

1.name: turn
1.text: Us buttons are programmed to shout commands

1.name: jump
1.text: And all of those bots are listening

1.name: slide
1.text: Click us and see what happens!

2.name: left
2.text: We're all programmed to shout!

2.name: up
2.text: We each shout for that bot to move in different directions

2.name: green
2.text: I already know how to @moveUp

2.name: green
2.text: Can you program me to move in the other directions?

3.name: mover
3.text: I know how to respond to some commands

3.name: button
3.text: You just need to teach me to shout

3.name: button
3.text: Edit my @onClick and see what happens

4.name: alice
4.text: Bob and I know how to do the same things

4.name: bob
4.text: Yeah! Just like the last bot

4.name: button
4.text: But now, I am whispering to Alice

4.name: button
4.text: See if you can make me whisper to Bob instead

1.name: blue
1.text: I want to take you to the "Sheet Portal"

1.name: blue
1.text: I'll be there, but I won't be able to talk

1.name: blue
1.text: I want you to change my #color and come back here

1.name: blue
1.text: Click on me when you're ready

1.name: blue
1.text: Nice job!

1.name: blue
1.text: You can edit all of your bots' tags in the Sheet Portal

1.name: ab-1
1.text: Normally, I would take you there

1.name: ab-1
1.text: But we'll meet later

2.name: green
2.text: Whoa! Where are we?

2.name: alien
2.text: You're in "outerSpace"

2.name: alien
2.text: It's a different dimension

2.name: green
2.text: I don't want to be here

2.name: green
2.text: Click on me to take me back!

2.name: green
2.text: That was weird!

2.name: green
2.text: I wonder how many dimensions there are...

3.name: teal
3.text: You can see all of us because our "#home" tag is true

3.name: pink
3.text: Try changing my @onClick to see who is in these dimensions

3.name: teal
3.text: We're all still here, but in different places!

3.name: pink
3.text: It's just me here! I love it

3.name: orange
3.text: When you're ready, click me to go to an extra special dimension

3.name: orange
3.text: This is ab1's dimension

3.name: orange
3.text: You can see his brain here

3.name: orange
3.text: We should go home to meet him properly

4.name: blue
4.text: Let's finally meet ab-1

4.name: ab1Proxy
4.text: Yeah, I've been here the whole time

4.name: ab1Proxy2
4.text: You can double-click anywhere on the grid to find me

4.name: ab1Proxy
4.text: If you click and drag from me, you can select or create bots

4.name: blue
4.text: Try using ab-1 to select me and open the Sheet Portal

4.name: blue
4.text: Nice! Now try using ab-1 to create a bot

4.name: blue
4.text: Great! Ab-1 can do lots of things

4.name: blue
4.text: But you can learn about all of them later

1.name: pink
1.text: We are in an instance

1.name: grey
1.text: What does that mean?

1.name: pink
1.text: Anyone can join us and work together!

1.name: link
1.text: Yeah, click me to see a link you could use to join us!

1.name: pink
1.text: An instance is a temporary space where we can build things

1.name: grey
1.text: Temporary? What do you mean?

1.name: pink
1.text: This instance will only be here today!

1.name: grey
1.text: Huh, I sure hope there's a way I can save my work...

2.name: teal
2.text: There are a couple of ways you can save your work

2.name: green
2.text: First, you can download all of the bots in the instance

2.name: green
2.text: Click 3 times on an empty space, then click "share"

2.name: green
2.text: If you click "download" you will get a file with all these bots in it

2.name: green
2.text: Later, you can drag and drop that file into CasualOS to create all those bots again

2.name: purple
2.text: Did you also notice the "publish ab" part of the share menu?

2.name: purple
2.text: Instead of downloading the bots, you can "publish" them

2.name: purple
2.text: Publishing bots saves them online

2.name: purple
2.text: And if you "encrypt" the ab, you can set a password you will need to open it later

3.name: blue
3.text: When you publish your work, it is put into an "egg"

3.name: blue
3.text: Let's try to find and hatch an egg

3.name: blue
3.text: Click an empty space 3 times to open the menu

3.name: blue
3.text: And where it says "search," type "foxModel"

3.name: blue
3.text: Then hit enter and hatch the egg!

3.name: blue
3.text: Any time you publish your work, that's how you can find it again!

1.name: yellow
1.text: There are a bunch more portals you can use

1.name: yellow
1.text: Click on me to open the Menu Portal in the "hello" dimension

2.name: homeRed
2.text: Click on me to visit the Map Portal!

2.name: homeRed
2.text: Bots in the Map Portal are placed on the earth!

2.name: homeRed
2.text: I trust you'll find a way back

2.name: homeRed
2.text: Bots' X and Y tags will be used as latitude & longitude in the Map Portal

3.name: blue
3.text: There are also two Mini Portals

3.name: blue
3.text: Click on me to open the "Mini Grid Portal"

3.name: orange
3.text: And click me to open the "Mini Map Portal"!

4.name: purple
4.text: There is one more portal you should know about

4.name: purple
4.text: The System Portal

4.name: purple
4.text: There, you can see ALL bots organized by their "system" tag

4.name: purple
4.text: First, double-click on an empty space

4.name: purple
4.text: Then, hold Shift and click on ab-1

4.name: purple
4.text: Click the "systemPortal=true" button to go there

4.name: purple
4.text: The System Portal can help you keep all of your bots organized

4.name: purple
4.text: Especially if you have a lot of them!
